emotion_and_vibe: Command-center focus, technical, elite, fast-paced startup growth. Authority and clarity.

rules: Use IBM Plex Mono for all game numbers, counters, and stats.
Huge contrast between headings and body text.

layout_strategy: Use 'Grid Borders (The Technical Look)' surface strategy.
Use 1px solid borders (border-border) with no soft shadows for containers to create a rigid, technical structure.
Dense data presentation. The main game UI should feel like a Bloomberg terminal or dense SaaS dashboard.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (bg-background or bg-secondary/50), 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover: slight lift and border glow.
surface_strategies.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none or max 4px radius). Primary buttons use Electric Blue (cyan) background with black text. High contrast.

motion_and_interactions.click_button: The main 'Launch Campaign' button must scale down significantly on active/press (active:scale-95) with a quick spring animation. Needs high tactile feel.
motion_and_interactions.floating_text: When clicking, spawn '+1' (or '+X') text elements at the click coordinates that float upwards and fade out using Framer Motion (AnimatePresence).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Rows in the upgrade list should highlight background (hover:bg-secondary) with explicitly set text color. Buy buttons should have clear disabled states if cost > current users.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use transition-colors duration-200 for all interactive elements.

general: Use pure HTML+Tailwind for the main game layout to achieve the technical grid look.
Use Shadcn UI for forms (Login/Register), Tables (Leaderboard), and Tabs/Dialogs if needed.
Customize Shadcn components to remove rounding (rounded-sm or rounded-none) and remove shadows.
Always include data-testid attributes for interactive elements.

game_ui.counter: Massive font (text-6xl+ font-mono) to display total users. Add a glowing text-shadow effect (drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.5)]).
game_ui.clicker: Central dominant element. Can be a massive bordered box or circular target. Use a distinct border or inner glow.
game_ui.upgrades_list: Dense table/list format. Left side: Upgrade name and effect (+1/sec). Right side: Cost and Buy button. If player cannot afford, dim the button and disable it.

images.description: Abstract dark tech texture, glowing particles in deep indigo and electric blue. Use as a fixed background for the app with low opacity (opacity-20 to 30) or as a mix-blend-mode overlay to add texture.
Dark server room. Use for the Home/Landing page background with a heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-black/70).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the dark background.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: Add data-testid to the main clicker button, upgrade buy buttons, login inputs, and navigation links.
